extortion.description: One of Canada’s leading litigation boutiques, with a history going back to 1993, Isaacs Odinocki LLP represents clients from across the spectrum of industries, including insurance, transportation, manufacturing and hospitality. We have extensive experience in insurance coverage disputes and insurance litigation. We are regularly retained to provide coverage advice and defend clients in product liability claims, construction and property damage matters, professional errors and omissions, hotel liability claims and general commercial litigation matters. True to its roots, the firm remains Canada’s preeminent marine and transportation practice, involved in precedent setting cases.
